name: Broccoli and Mushrooms in Oyster Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Clean the broccoli and trim off any flowers, cutting the stalks into bite-sized pieces.
2. Heat a wok over high heat and add the oil. When the oil is hot, add the garlic and stir-fry for 10 seconds.
3. Add the broccoli to the wok and stir-fry until it is well coated in oil.
4. Once the wok is no longer oily, add a splash of water or chicken stock. Continue frying, stirring constantly for about 3 minutes, adding more liquid as needed to prevent drying out.
5. Toss in the mushrooms and continue cooking for another minute.
6. Add the oyster sauce and stir until combined.
7. Cover the wok and simmer at medium heat for two minutes.
8. Serve.
